intro: Demosthenesia microphylla, also known as Andes rose or Chile rose, is a shrub native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and inflammation, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Demosthenesia microphylla include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
